description_long: This chair features a rounded, cocoon-like seat upholstered in a textured blue fabric, providing a modern and inviting appearance. The seat is deep and curves upward to form a high, enveloping backrest, offering substantial support and comfort. The chair is supported by four slender, angled metal legs with circular feet, giving it a stable yet lightweight look. The upholstery displays a woven or pixelated pattern in varying shades of blue, adding visual interest and a tactile quality. The absence of armrests and the open front make it easily accessible. Its contemporary design and durable materials suggest suitability for both public and semi-private urban spaces.
description: A modern, blue, fabric-upholstered chair with a high curved backrest and four slender metal legs, featuring a woven pattern and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, rounded seat and high backrest, with the blue woven pattern and two front metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the deep, sloped seat and the full height of the backrest, with two angled legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, curved backrest and the two rear legs, emphasizing the chair's enveloping shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the sloped seat and high backrest with two angled legs.
